originalTitle: 'Indefensible' and 'unacceptable' - furious Rosenior questions Chelsea's desire
originalDescription: Chelsea boss Liam Rosenior strongly criticises his players after they suffer a fifth loss in a row without scoring for first time since 1912.

originalTitle: How Leicester went from Premier League champions to League One in a decade
originalDescription: Ten years ago, Leicester were days away from winning the Premier League. Next season, they will play in League One. How?

originalTitle: Brighton beat Chelsea to heap more pressure on Rosenior
originalDescription: Brighton heap more pressure on Chelsea manager Liam Rosenior as they ease to a comfortable 3-0 win thanks to goals from Ferdi Kadioglu, Jack Hinshelwood and Danny Welbeck.

originalTitle: Players can celebrate how they want - Guardiola
originalDescription: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola says his players can "celebrate however you want" in response to criticism for their reaction to beating Arsenal.

originalTitle: Kolo Muani on Liverpool's radar - Wednesday's gossip
originalDescription: Liverpool could move for Randal Kolo Muani, Kobbie Mainoo agrees to new Manchester United deal and Bernardo Silva is on Arsenal and Barcelona's radar.

originalTitle: Things need to change after 'unacceptable' defeat - Rosenior
originalDescription: Chelsea head coach Liam Rosenior says his side's 3-0 defeat away at Brighton was "unacceptable" from everyone involved and that things need to change.

originalTitle: 'People can say whatever stupid things they want' - Guardiola on celebrations
originalDescription: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola says his players can "celebrate however you want" in response to criticism from some pundits for his side's reaction to beating Arsenal on Sunday.

originalTitle: Watch the goals and celebrations as St Johnstone clinch title
originalDescription: St Johnstone win 2-0 at Dunfermline Athletic to wrap up the Scottish Championship title with two games to spare.

originalTitle: Papers: Mainoo set to sign new five-year Man Utd deal
originalDescription: The top stories and transfer rumours from Wednesday's newspapers...

originalTitle: St Johnstone seal instant return to Scottish Premiership
originalDescription: Second-half goals from Reece McAlear and Ruari Paton sealed St Johnstone's instant return to the William Hill Premiership at East End Park.

originalTitle: 'Catastrophic' Leicester slammed after relegation to League One
originalDescription: Leicester have been relegated from the Sky Bet Championship after a 2-2 draw against Hull.

originalTitle: Heat rises on Rosenior as Brighton surge past shambolic Chelsea
originalDescription: Chelsea’s season hit a new low as they lost for the fifth league game in a row without scoring in a dismal 3-0 defeat at Brighton.

originalTitle: 'Indefensible!' - every word from unimpressed Rosenior after Chelsea shambles
originalDescription: Liam Rosenior hit out at the "indefensible", "unacceptable" and "unprofessional" performance of his Chelsea players in two separate interviews after their 3-0 defeat at Brighton.

originalTitle: From Premier League glory to League One - Leicester's fall from grace
originalDescription: On May 2 2016, Leicester won the Premier League title for the first time, famously beating odds of 5,000/1 to do so.

originalTitle: The F1 Show: What impact will rule changes have from Miami GP?

originalDescription: West Brom clinched Sky Bet Championship safety - pending a possible points deduction - with a 3-0 win over Watford at The Hawthorns.
